entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hello Harvey,

We currently capture attributes " First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, Preferred First Name & Preferred Last Name".

Is there a way to configure DISPLAY NAME with combination " Preferred First Name, Middle Name, Preferred Last Name"

If Preferred First Name is empty, consider First Name

If Middle Name is empty, should ignore.

If Preferred Last Name is empty, consider Last Name.

please advise if that's feasible.

Best Regards,

Murali.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps How to save data in draft after button...

entry.title: Re: How to Start with Custom Situations: Detailed Design of Your Use Case (2/4)
entry.content:
Dear Angelika,

 

thanks for all your blogs about custom situation handling. I have one question that I couldnt solve so far. How to set conditions if I want to have notification for simple change.

 

Simple case. I want to get situation for every change of purchasing group on PO. I can fill the condition for purchasing group with 002 and I get situation for every change to purchasing group 002. But I would like to get nofiticiation for every change of purchasing group on any purchase order. Or really similar case. I would like get situation for any change of delivery date on purchase order item. Not only for example 30 days forward but any. 

 

What should be in the condition to have this setup??

 

Thanks a lot in advance for your clarification!

 

Michal

entry.title: Re: Rejected PO with reference to Contract is visible as...

entry.title: Re: In SAP CPI B2B I am getting error "cannot be imported...
entry.content:
If MIG is existing in your Quality system, check that the new MIG from Development is:
1. Active
2. Next version.

If version has been skipped, remove the MIG in quality then import the latest version. 
Update your agreements accordingly.

entry.title: Re: International Editable SALV Day 2025...

entry.title: Syntax error in program SAPLSCWE Running t-code SNOTE
entry.content:
After implemented the OSNOTE on SNOTE:

1668882 Por favor, instale para mantener Note Assistant actualizado
2869143 Por favor, instale para asegurar la descarga correcta de las pistas
3093855 Por favor, instale para mantener Note Assistant actualizado

The program SNOTE was dump with the following message:

Error in the ABAP application program.

The current ABAP program "SAPLSCWP" had to be terminated because it found a
statement that could not be executed.
In include "CL_SCWN_NOTE_SAR_FILE_N=======CU ", in line 32 of program
"SAPLSCWE ", the following syntax errors
have occurred:
Type "CWB_T_NOTE_DWLD_HTML_RESP" is unknown.

 


Author and last person to change the include are:
Author SAP
Last changed by "CK_STARTUP "

 

Help with solve this issue on SAP S4 2022 DEV

entry.title: Sending email triggers a sales order re-transfer to S4
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have a scenario where users can email sales order data to the customer from Sales Order TI->Actions->Send E-Mail option. 

When a user sends an email from a sales order that has already been transferred to S4 and confirmed with a sales order number, the system is again triggering a "transfer" to S4.

Why would the system think there is a change to the order, when only an email is sent out of the order. 

Is there a way to stop this? I did not find any enhancement (BADI) options for this. 

thanks in advance. 

Mayna

entry.title: Re: Expert Talk: Inspection Checklist in Maintenance Management – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Hello @Gerhard_Welker 

Thanks for sharing very well content.

In S/4 S/4HANA 2022 , we had to implemented inspection checklist from the scratch :  Order type YA07 without  phase model and SAP GUI. 

In SSAM 2310 we had to config phase model (for reactive and proactive) and no phase model (for inspection checklist).

From now , with inspection checklist with phase model the user expierence will be unique (SAP Fiori). Also SSAM integration would be effortless (only phase model configuration) 

I was wonder if there is planned date for the Inpection checklist Scope Item in SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA 2023 Cloud Private Edition?. 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025
entry.content: Muito bom....

entry.title: SET UP PRIMARY FINANCE SETTINGS IN SAP CBC (Central Business Configuration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We would like to ask regarding the fiscal year variant maintained in the CBC while setting up the Primary Finance Settings, since the set up cannot be undone unless the system is reprovisioned.
  1. Is it right to use the K4 as the fiscal year variant in the Primary Finance Settings activity and use the non-leading ledgers (such as 2L) with different fiscal year variant, for example SZ-Configurable template variant, for reporting purposes? 
     
  2. What will you recommend for schools as an industry with varying fiscal or academic year?
    Example: 
    This year, the academic year is August 2025 to July 2026, but it is possible that the next academic year will be changed to June to May. 
  3. What is the use of Fiscal year variant "SZ" - Configurable template variant and is it modifiable?

entry.title: Re: Rounding Discrepancy for Goal Results Payout Amount –...
entry.content:
Hi @Ravi14, it should be possible with custom design, can you please document what you have tried to far ? If you look at the design of this blog, you can bring currency code into each section details and build if-then rules accordingly.

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/variable-pay-custom-gates-with-cross-section-impact/ba-p/14005986 

All the best, Xavier

entry.title: Build Error
entry.content:
Hello

I am not sure if there is a particular area where I can research this.  Please let me know if there is; but this is an error I am getting on APK build.

AB version: 3.11.0
COMMAND:

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 --no-experimental-global-navigator npxrnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates

entry.title: Creating a geomap widget in SAC from a live data model from PaPM
entry.content:
Hello folks,

I'm triying to create a Geomap (I'm skipping the steps to create the story's widget) in SAC while using a live data model to PaPM. But there's little or no information/documentation available to follow the steps in order to create the "geodimension" to make the geomap widget. 

However, there is this link (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f7f432923cd9495bb5c98d5cdd667663.html)  where explains that IT'S possible to create a "geodimension" with a Hana Calculation View using a live connetion. But the problem lies that the client only has PaPM as a source data, no Hana Studio is available. 

Is there any documentation or knows the proper steps to create the "geodimension" in order to add the geomap widget. 

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Implementing Permit to Work in SAP S/4HANA - Part 1
entry.content: Excellent!!!

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩
entry.content: Completed 😊

entry.title: Reconciliation of Data Between SAP and Databricks via SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello  , we’re integrating SAP data (via BW and SAP DI) into Databricks, but we often struggle with data reconciliation and alignment between the two platforms. Has anyone used SAP Datasphere to streamline this process and ensure consistent, accurate data across SAP and Databricks? We’d appreciate any insights, best practices, or lessons learned on how SAP Datasphere can help resolve these challenges and improve data integrity in such a hybrid environment.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content:
Hey,

I had a similar issue. We were able to complete this by de-selecting the Post-Quality flag on the material master. In /SCWM/QRSETUP, you can set records that if it is received by business partner of the plant or sloc then enter unrestricted use stock type. Then a record that says if received by any business partner it is received into quality. 

This worked for us. The stock type on the delivery will show as unrestricted use. However, it will flip into quality upon GR and it will trigger an inspection lot creation. We also used POSC to determine quality bin for goods receipt. The only issue we couldn't get passed was un-triggering this POSC if it was received via STO. However, we had a manual process that allowed for this because STO materials were received to a different part of the warehouse then regular inbound. So it was easy for the clerk to determine that this did not go to quality area. Regardless if it did, it would not create an inspection lot because /SCWM/QRSETUP triggered the receiving business partner.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content: From memory, this does not work for EWM.

entry.title: Planned downtime option in Onboarding Form in SAP S/4 HANA RISE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While updating Planned Down Time option in customer on boarding form, I mentioned it as Second Sunday of 10:30PM IST. I need more clarification on Planned Down Time in CoF.

1) What does Planned Down Time mean? and the purpose of Planned down time?

2) Does SAP perform any activity only on the day only I mentioned above?

3) Does SAP intimate about down time to the customer before taking any action?

4) Can we change Planned downtime in future based on business needs?

5) Please give more insight on planned downtime on customer onboarding form.

Kindly address the above points which will help us to take decision on Planned down time 

Thanks in advance.

Vamsi Mohan

entry.title: Re: In SAP CPI B2B I am getting error "cannot be imported...
entry.content:
Hi Sathish,

In that case, move your agreement using B2B Cross Action - Import and Export Agreement. The MIG and MAG will be imported with the agreement.
Ref. https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/cross-actions

Regards,
Jovee

I want to know the process of Downpayment in FICA how to create it so that it can reflect at FPL9 against BP and CA. If the Downpayment is already created, how can we return the same amount to BP and CA.

As there are Main Transaction : 3000

And Sub Transaction : 0010 for debit and 0020 for credit

Yew

entry.title: Re: End to End Designing the Multilevel Hierarchy in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Driko,

Surprisingly I didn't face your situation.The standard interface CDS views I_* that I used in my design are not Parameterized CDS views. In your case if it's Parameterized CDS which wait for user input then you have to create custom cds views removing the parameter. To consume CDS views in any of the case like Dataflow, replication flow or remote table then cds views should not be Parameterized. May I know what version of S4 you are using.

 

Thanks 

Kartheek

entry.title: Re: Why the code added inside a CMS Paragraph Component from SmartEdit disappears after saving it
entry.content: Nice, but this is not how a Q&A site works. The Question and Answer should be different, not merged into the Question itself. Check how StackOverflow works.

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I just wanted to quickly share more info regarding the list of elements thats shared several times throughout the comments in this blog. First, as shared in the posts above and to the general learning community, we have extended the ability for customers to still run the legacy homepage until 2H2025 release. We are still planning to deliver optional surveys, optional curricula assignments, and admins seeing the new ILX in proxy mode in 1H2025 release. In addition, the library search content update timeframes will be dramatically reduced. The assignment of new access or access removal to libraries happening in near-real time is already starting to roll out to your production environments this week, while updates to content also happening in near-real-time is planned with the 1H2505 release.  We are also working on a Browse All (blank search) feature, while Class search capabilities are planned for 2H2025.  

With regards to the design elements of the number of cards or thumbnails on required learning, these designs were carefully vetted based on user research and our design principles of clarity, efficiency, and consistency. 8 cards in a particular category is meant to give the user quick access to their top priority options in that category without overwhelming the user with an endless scroll. Once a user needs to find something beyond the top 8, they go into a focused screen within that category with much more options to discover what they are specifically looking for (without the extra distraction of other components of the page).  Users also confirmed that when they are reviewing assigned learning, the assignment information, time investment, and actions to get started such as pre-requisite or approval indicators were the most important job to be done in that moment. The thumbnail in those scenarios are not relevant to their urgency to take the required actions to complete the relevant training. If they wanted to explore more about the course, those additional elements become more visible in the course, program or requirement pool details pages. 

Marking items as featured now drives greater behavior throughout the suite, including prioritizing order of display in many scenarios. Although the marker isn't directly displayed on the search result card, the users can filter on these elements, and we are looking into more meaningful ways of indicating this rather than just a label marker in the future.

Hope this helps bring clarity to the items being mentioned in regards to the new Integrated Learning Experience. We continuously strive to bring you the best tools to effectively run your business, while giving your end-users a wonderful experience. Thank you for your engagement in this community.

entry.title: SAP BI Launchpad - Scheduled Reports are Blank but Run Fine in Web Intelligence
entry.content: Scheduled reports to emails are returning blank but have data when run in Web Intelligence. It was running fine a couple weeks ago but have since been returning blank reports. Any one know what the issue is here?

entry.title: Incorrect "House Bank" and "House Bank Account" in Check Cash Flow Item app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have noticed an issue that the journal entries displayed in “APP: Manage Journal Entries” are correct, but when I try to check them in “APP: Check Cash Flow Item,” they do not show “House Bank： SKSFK” and “House Bank Account： TTUMI, but are linked to “House Bank： GNMHD” and “House Bank Account： FUTUU"

Could you please verify why this is happening?

The details are as below

※Journal Entriy：100000975
APP： Manage Journal Entries
※ “House Bank： SKSFK” and “House Bank Account： TTUMI

APP： Check Cash Flow Item
※ “House Bank： GNMHD” and “House Bank Account： FUTUU”

 

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Deployment of Organizational Structure from Development Tenant
entry.content:
Dear All

We have created an Organizational Structure having 7 company codes and around 300 organizational units in Development - Customizing (Implementation) system.

Now what is the use of creating such a huge organizational structure in development - development tenant once again manually while the organizational structure of customizing tenant has already been transported to QAS system.

Which Organizational Structure will be considered as final on QAS system, the one created in customizing tenant or development tenant.

entry.title: Configuration created in wrong Namespace
entry.content:
Dear All 

While implementing a Public Cloud Project , consultant from the background of On-Prem implementation created all configurations with Y Namespace. Usually configurations performed by customer, either during ABAP development or SPRO were starting from Z or Y or 9 namespace.

Later on, we found an SAP Note that 'Y' in public cloud is considered as SAP namespace.

Consultant has created following configuration with 'Y Namespace' and also moved it to QAS. Please confirm the impact and any possible solution or can we leave the configuration in 'Y namespace' as it is, as a lot of work has already completed in it.

  • Factory Calendar
  • Standard Value Key
  • Work Center Responsible
  • Routing planner group
  • MRP Controller
  • Special Procurement Types
  • Order Type
  • Production Scheduler & Profile

entry.title: Supplier Invoice Number Ranges
entry.content:
Dear All

We have seven company codes located in multiple countries. We want to have different Supplier Invoice Number Ranges within MM / Procurement Module, as each company code is a separate legal entity. 5 Company Codes are located in 1 country and remaining 2 in other countries.

Currently we are not able to find any option to change the interval or setup number ranges for Supplier Invoice within Procurement Module of Public Cloud.

Please suggest any alternate or  solution.

entry.title: Smart Cloud Spending: Leveraging FinOps and UDM in SAP BTP ✨
entry.content:
In the session about SAP BTP FinOps, we’ll get you and your team ready to take control of FinOps and Usage Data Management on SAP Business Technology Platform. We’ll make sure you’re set with the knowledge to navigate BTP’s core features and get you ready to go with hands-on insights that will help you drive financial efficiency and achieve your business objectives.
We recommend you familiarize yourself with the service before – ideally you have already implemented and started working with it. This will allow you to raise your specific questions to optimally use the service for your benefit.
Background information about the service and its capabilities and the so-called related Mission on SAP BTP can be found here:
BTP FinOps: Keeping Track of your Credits: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/btp-finops-keeping-track-of-your-credits/ba-p/13737793 
SAP Discovery Center Mission - Control your Operational Cost: Setting up a BTP Financial Operations application: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/4489/4776/ 

Got questions? Stick around for the live Q&A at the end, where our presenters will address your queries directly.

entry.title: Re: Short Dump Business function MDG_ERP_CUSTOMER_12 must...
entry.content:
Have you checked notes 2847807. If you are using both Supplier and Customer BP, I think the following to be activated in the correct order 

1. MDG_FOUNDATION_14
2. MDG_FOUNDATION_14_2
3. MDG_BUPA_10
4. MDG_ERP_SUPPLIER_13
5. MDG_ERP_CUSTOMER_12

entry.title: OKB9 Settings for 7*series Income GLs in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Requesting your suggestion on the following matter:

While working on OKB9 settings for few 7* series revenue ledgers in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, even after selecting the Profitability Segment, system is throwing error message no. KI305. To resolve this issue, it becomes mandatory to assign some Cost Centers in OKB9 even for revenue GLs. While checking the GL account master data, the standard Cost Element category provided for these GLs are 1- Primary Cost/ cost-reducing revenue. Including few such GL accounts:

70010000

70100000

70300000

70800000

Requesting to guide me on how to resolve this issue.

Is it necessary to give Cost Center as a cost object in OKB9 or is there any other solution for this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Using a Single App Router for Multiple CAP Services
entry.content:
Hi Brian,

This should be perfectly possible since the approuter and the CAP service application are 2 distinct applications in any case. So whether it's a single CAP service application or multiple shouldn't really matter.

The approuter is responsible of getting the user authenticated against the bound xsuaa service instance. Then it will route requests to the correct destination (CAP service application) based on the route. Note that these destinations are configured with 'no authentication', basically meaning that the token that the approuter gives it, should suffice to gain access to the CAP service. This implies that each CAP service should rely on the exact same xsuaa service instance, otherwise they won't accept the token.

You could rewire the default destinations to do token exchange as well, but if it's not a problem to use a single xsuaa service instance then this would be the easiest approach.

So just make sure that all applications (approuter + CAP services) are bound to the same xsuaa service instance and that your routes are configured to forward the token (default setting).

If you experience any issues, it would help to post your MTA here, or provide a git with your sample code to explore further.

entry.title: How to Create Custom field in Sales Quotation Item and Flow it to Subsequent Sales Order Item
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I got a requirement to Create a Custom field at Sales Quotation Item level and the Value Given at Quotation level should flow to subsequent Sales Order.

I tried creating Custom field through Custom Fields App in Key user extensibility and checked Business Context for Sales Quotation but didn't find. so tried creating field in Sales Document Item business context, the field is getting created in both Sales Quotation and Sales Order but the values which entered at Quotation level are not flowing to Sales order.

Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Re: Node Functions in SAP CPI for Data Transformation.
entry.content: Hi Vamsi, Thanks for sharing. Is removing Context is similar to removing the duplications from the source XML structure

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Error - No database credentials provided
entry.content:
This problem occurs due to binding missing in from your local project to database .

Soultion

you need local env file in your project which hold all detail to connect your local project with hana db , connectivity service etc

Step to solve this problem execute below steps

Sep1. Login to cloud foundry and select with your organization and space

Step 2. Expand service folder as shown in above screen shot and right click on each service and click on bind a service to a locally run application.

Step 3.open terminal and run cds watch . now you connected with hana database

entry.title: SAP DATASPHERE: DYNAMIC FILTER TO START ON FIRST DAY OF THE YEAR
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working with creating a dynamic filter from a graphic view in SAP Datasphere for a data extraction from a remote table that contains 20 million records from the source system.  I would like to apply a date filter to only extract into Datasphere the previous two years plus current to omit from extracting in the 20 million records.  

Currently I have a manual date filter of POST_DATE BETWEEN '20230101' AND '99991231'.  I would like to apply a dynamic filter so I won't have to change the dates manually each year.  I also need the date function of the filter to start on the first day of the previous two years. 

I tried subtracting the 2 years from the current date function but then the filter will start two years back based on current date.  Example:  20230212.  I need the date to be 20230101

Then for when the year switches to 2026 then the date range of the dynamic filter will be '20240101' AND '99991231'

If anyone can provide assistance that would be great. 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to Grey Out an Attribute or Attribute Value in SA...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can achieve the desired result using the standard product modeling method in SAP CPQ.

To grey out an attribute, you can adjust its property by setting 'Access' to 'ReadOnly'. This will create the desired UI effect.

However, formula rules currently do not support changes to the 'Access' property of an attribute. Instead, scripting is required to read and modify the access level of an attribute within a product configuration model. You can implement these changes through the Attribute Trigger event or other supported Product context events. Below is a detailed guide for scripting:

  • IProductAttribute.Access Property
  • AttributeAccess Enumeration

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Need WBS ELEMENT in start condition of Manage workflow for journal entry verification
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Need to add wbs element in start condition in manage workflow for journal entry verification.

For that I have created badi but wbs element Value for help is not coming and i have given SCENARIO_ID = WS02800046.

I think due to service path & entity only the value is not coming.

please check and revert.

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF

CONSTANTS: co_id TYPE if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>ty_condition_id VALUE 'CF_SWF_FLEX_IFS_BADI_COND_SAMP'.

data : ls_condition like line of ct_condition.
data : ls_parameter like line of ct_parameter.

* WBS Element Condition
ls_condition-id = 'id_WBS'.
ls_condition-subject = 'WBS Element'.
ls_condition-type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_condtype-start_step.
append ls_condition to ct_condition.

* Parameter for Workflow level condition - WBS Element
ls_parameter-id = 'id_WBS'.
ls_parameter-name = 'WBS Element'.
ls_parameter-xsd_type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_xstype-string.
ls_parameter-service_path = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PROJECT_SRV'. " Update with appropriate OData service
ls_parameter-entity = 'WBSHierarchyNode'. " Adjust entity name accordingly
ls_parameter-property = 'WBSCode'. " Adjust property for WBS element
ls_parameter-mandatory = abap_false.
append ls_parameter to ct_parameter.

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL

CONSTANTS co_id TYPE if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>ty_condition_id VALUE 'CL_SWF_FLEX_IFS_BADI_COND_SAMP' ##NO_TEXT.

cv_is_true = abap_false.
DATA lt_wbs_element TYPE TABLE OF i_journalentryitem.

IF is_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_2 IS INITIAL.
SELECT WBSELEMENTINTERNALID INTO TABLE @LT_wbs_element
FROM i_journalentryitem
WHERE accountingdocument = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1.
ELSE.
SELECT WBSELEMENTINTERNALID INTO TABLE @LT_wbs_element
FROM i_journalentryitem
WHERE accountingdocument = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1
AND accountingdocumentitem = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_2.
ENDIF.

IF lt_wbs_element IS NOT INITIAL.
READ TABLE lt_wbs_element INTO DATA(ls_wbs_element) INDEX 1.
READ TABLE it_parameter_value INTO DATA(ls_param_wbs) WITH KEY name = 'WBS Element'.

IF sy-subrc EQ 0 AND ls_param_wbs-value = ls_wbs_element-WBSELEMENTINTERNALID.
cv_is_true = abap_true.
ENDIF.
ENDIF.

 

Kindly, requesting you to help on this.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Custom Logic for the fields in Custome CDS (S4 Public...
entry.content: We have created a Data Definition and a Custom Data Browser object using ATD, we're able to view it in the View Browser and the Customer Data Browser app with the values. However, I'm not able to use it in the Custom CDS. Could you please confirm if there is anything else we need to configure in order for it to be usable in the view within the Custom CDS?

entry.title: How to set the identified stock ID status to blocked automatically once its stock change to empty?
entry.content:
Hi SAP

After the receipt of a batch of material, the inventory is gradually consumed, and the stock batch number is still valid, can it automatically become blocked?
This avoids the fact that you always see these batch numbers that are not physically stocked on the consumption interface.

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set the identified stock ID status to blocked...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Currently, there is no way to set the identified stock ID status to blocked automatically once its stock changes to empty. You need to maintain this manually.

Thanks and regards,
Aurora

entry.title: SAP Build App subscription failed
entry.content:
Hi fellow members, 

Hope you are doing well.

I am trying to subscribe to SAP Build App in BTP trial account, and I am getting Subscription failed. without getting much error details. 

I followed the manual configuration (https://help.sap.com/docs/BUILD_APPS/431746e4c663458aa68d9754b237bfc6/manual-configuration ) and Booster but the result is same. 

Please advise. 

Thanks in advance

SAP Build SAP Build Apps SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Re: Batch valuation. Standard price. Actual costing.
entry.content:
Hi Laimonas,

You need to mark and release standard cost for the mother material. In this way price differences will be built on the split valuated batch against the released preliminary cost evaluation.

This is a specific way that batch valuated materials are handled in a 3S scenario, their cost is not determined with the purchase order but only the price differences are.

entry.title: Pending IR List Required
entry.content: I have list of Vendor POs. I need the list of Pending IR with PO No and PO line. EKBE and ME80FN lists are giving all transaction history. But I need sorted data for pending Report only as the PO list is good in number.

Mainak Chakraborty

entry.content:

We have scheduled RSP backups on local storage and configured the RSP mail system. I need to modify the subject line of the RSP emails. Is it possible to customize the subject line, or does it remain the same as the standard subject line provided by SAP?

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Addition to stock putaway strategy

entry.title: Re: [SAP PO 7.5] Problem with adding wrapper element name with dot (.) in REST receiver adapter
entry.content:
We have the same problem with a REST receiver adapter.

The outer XML tag is a RFC response message in the format RFCName.Response.
But only tag <Response> was created. But we need <RFCName.Response>.

Does anybody has a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: SCIM Connector on CIS in BTP trial version
entry.content: Just a follow-up question on this please. Is there any other way to connect a 3rd party application to IPS as a source system without the SCIM connector? Or is it then not possible to connect a 3rd party system to IPS without purchasing a license for IAG to get the SCIM connector? Or am I misunderstanding?

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @S0025138380 ,

It is possible to reach what you want. You need to use a business rule that implements exactly what you wish.

We had the same request from our business and created a business rule that sets the Display Name to Preferred First Name + Preferred Last Name if those are available.

Afterwards we set the Name Format to be the Display Name.

I hope this help.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: DM Deprecated Services in Production Processes
entry.content:
Deprecated APIs are normally still usable up to 12 months after deprecation. However, there are certain cases were APIs are decommissioned even before this period. See this help page for details: https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCT_ID/e56a6c50d31541ea826021dc8e721a53/5cbfda5a9efe4e97a3e24ddaf7ec5c16.html?state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud&locale=en-US 

In general, I would highly recommend replacing them sooner than later. Also read the release notes carefully if the decommissioning is mentioned, also in the API Hub change log you normally find the deprecation release to calculate the decommissioning release.

entry.title: 在维护“设置支付事务的银行确定”时，银行子账户不能维护，保存后为空
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance##在维护“设置支付事务的银行确定”时，银行子账户不能维护，保存后为空

entry.title: Re: Missing Change Request Type Selection in Fiori "Manag...
entry.content:
Hi Jose,

MDG FIORI app uses business activity 'BPF1'. Please check the CR types which are relevant for this business activity.

Regards,

Saravanan

entry.title: Subscription Failed error in configuring SAP Build Apps in Trial Account

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Issue - High Impact
entry.content:
Dear Members,

The Build Apps is now being giving issues from last week.

I was receiving the 403 error so I tried all possible approaches and there was no way to resolve it.

Currently, I deleted the sub account and tried to access the Build Apps with a new Sub Account.

The installation failed, stating unable to subscribe to the SaaS application.

When I opened it in the Subscriptions of the sub account, still it's in the free plan but failing to install the application. Below screenshots would help you to understand the issue in detail.

I had a demo in the coming week and lost everything at the moment. IT would be helpful if someone can provide me a good solution.

Thanks and Regards,

Ananthu RB

entry.title: Why can I find an employee/user in "hire date correction" field but not elsewhere in EC?
entry.content:
I have a strange situation, where I need to delete a user from EC, because the flow from recruiting to onboarding did not go smooth, due to change of hire date in the future. The employee had initially start date February 1, but the actual first day was February 10. Somehow my team managed to change the hiring-date from 2/1/2025 to 2/10/2025, but then the employee "disappeared" in EC.

We searched after the employee in recruiting, org.chart, search-bar, onboarding and reporting, but we could not find the person until we used "hire date correction" - then the employees name showed but without much data. 

We now want to start the process from scratch with this employee (meaning creating the employee again), but first we must delete the persons data entirely from EC. Due to error message from SF stating "employee data already exists", when we try to create the employee again, this is not possible.

To sum up: How can we delete this persons data for good, when we can't find the employee in purge/data retention management?

entry.title: Re: Routing: Alternative Sequence & Parallel Sequence in SAP
entry.content:
Really nice write up, thank you so much for sharing!

One comment: when working with sequences it is crucial to always consider the restrictions mentioned in SAP note 41546. Perhaps you could add this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Sustainability Footprint Management: Q4-24 Updates & Highlights
entry.content: Thank you Nico, once again great achievements and progress!
